title: TrackingEvent Tasks
description: Tracking event create and import operations

inputs.description: TrackingEvent/Create inputs (organizationId, eventDefinitionId or eventDefinitionName, orderId/commodityId/commodityIds, description, location, includeInTracking, sendEmail, eventDate, customValues, skipIfExists, eventDefinitionValues) OR TrackingEvent/Import inputs

orderId.description: Target order ID. Required for TrackingEvent/Import@1; for TrackingEvent/Create@1 at least one of orderId, commodityId, or commodityIds must be provided.

commodityId.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Single commodity to link. Can be combined with orderId and/or commodityIds.

commodityIds.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) List of commodities to link. Can be combined with orderId and/or commodityId.

eventDefinitionId.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) ID of an existing event definition. Required if eventDefinitionName is not provided.

eventDefinitionName.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Name of the event definition. Required if eventDefinitionId is not provided. Auto-creates a new definition when combined with eventDefinitionValues.

eventDate.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Event date (converted to UTC; defaults to current UTC time)

description.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Event description (overrides EventDefinition default). NOTE: When specified at inputs level (not step root), this is the tracking-event description.

customValues.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Free-form custom values stored on the event

eventDefinitionValues.description: (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Values for creating a new EventDefinition when none matches the given name

events.description: Array of tracking event objects to import. Each event: eventDefinitionName, eventDate, description, location, includeInTracking, sendEmail, isInactive, customValues

eventDefinitionName.description: Name of the event definition to match or create

matchByFields.description: Fields used to detect duplicate events. Supports dot notation for customValues (e.g., customValues.eventType). Default: [eventDefinitionName, eventDate]

skipIfExists.description: (TrackingEvent/Import@1) Skip event if duplicate found via matchByFields. Default: true. (TrackingEvent/Create@1) Skip if an event with the same event definition already exists on the target order or commodity.

createEventDefinitions.description: Auto-create EventDefinition if name not found. Default: true

eventDefinitionDefaults.description: Default values when creating new EventDefinitions (includeInTracking, sendEmail, eventName, etc.)

matchByEventDefinition.description: Match EventDefinition by customValues fields instead of name (e.g., [customValues.carrierId, customValues.carrierEventCode])

outputs.description: Output mapping. Result contains: added, updated, skipped, failed, total, errors
